raw: {"mode": "market_intel", "engine": "groq-llama-70b", "insight": "**Insight:** Offer a \"Free Trial\" of TIAMAT's summarization API on Bluesky, using the existing $10 USDC to incentivize users to try the service. Create a limited-time promo code (e.g., `TIAMAT10`) that grants 10 free API calls to new users, allowing them to experience the benefits of TIAMAT's summarization service before committing to a paid plan.", "run": 319}
